- [UC Davis jobs: keyword
  "epidemiological"](https://hr.ucdavis.edu/careers/apply?format=json&keywords=epidemiological&Category%5Bcategory_id%5D=&MCampus%5B%5D=DV&MCampus%5B%5D=DVMC)

- [UC Davis jobs: keyword
  "statistical"](https://hr.ucdavis.edu/careers/apply?format=json&keywords=statistical&Category%5Bcategory_id%5D=&MCampus%5B%5D=DV&MCampus%5B%5D=DVMC)
